name: Gary Barbera on the Blvd
description_short: Gary Barbera on the Blvd is a credit repair provider based in Philadelphia, Pennsylvania. Rated 4.7/5 with 7,985 Google reviews, reflecting excellent customer satisfaction.
description_long:
Gary Barbera on the Blvd is a credit repair provider serving clients in Philadelphia, Pennsylvania. With 7,985 Google reviews and a 4.7/5.0 rating, Gary Barbera on the Blvd has built a significant presence in the local credit repair market.

Operating as a used car dealer, auto body parts supplier, auto body shop, Gary Barbera on the Blvd provides a range of services for consumers seeking credit repair solutions. Additional information about their services and processes can typically be found on their website.

When evaluating credit repair services in Philadelphia, consumers should look for providers that dispute directly with all three credit bureaus — Equifax, Experian, and TransUnion. Key differentiators include transparency around pricing, realistic timelines for results, and whether the company offers a money-back guarantee. Gary Barbera on the Blvd operates in a highly regulated industry under the Credit Repair Organizations Act (CROA), which requires written contracts, a three-day cancellation window, and prohibits upfront fees before services are rendered.

Consumers in the Philadelphia, Pennsylvania area who are considering Gary Barbera on the Blvd should contact the company directly to discuss their specific situation and get current pricing information. As with any credit repair provider, it is advisable to compare multiple options, verify licensing and credentials, and read recent customer reviews before making a decision.
